title: Curse of Curses
description: A mod which applies a random curse with a configurable chance each night to a random enchantable item in players inventory.
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/) **[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)** ![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/curse-of-curses/header.png) ![How It Works](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/curse-of-curses/how_it_works.png)
This is a mod which applies random Curse enchantments at three random times from midnight to 3am in-game. These times are resettet each day. The chance is configurable in the server config. To prevent this, you simply need to sleep. But be aware, too many sleeping may add curses, too. This is configurable as well. The mod needs to be on client **and** server. If the mod is only on server, the client will only see the unlocalized message.
![Recommendations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/curse-of-curses/recommendations.png)
It is highly recommended to use this mod with other mods which add curse enchantments - [Cursed](https://modrinth.com/mod/cursed-mod) by Darkhax. - [Curses](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curses) by Cyborg - and many more
You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like. ![[Werbung](https://www.bisecthosting.com/melanx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/curse-of-curses/promo.png) #Werbung #Ad
